_description: Test cases for the Product Search API. Run these against your deployed worker to verify functionality.
_auth: All requests (except health) require: Authorization: Bearer <API_SECRET>

search_queries.name: Natural language query

body.query: gift ideas for a coffee lover

search_queries.notes: Tests semantic understanding — should return coffee-related products across categories.

search_queries.name: Category browsing
search_queries.notes: Should return products from footwear/athletic categories.

search_queries.name: Synonym handling
search_queries.notes: Tests semantic understanding — 'bag' and 'carry case' should match similar products.

search_queries.name: Price-conscious query
search_queries.notes: Semantic search doesn't filter by price, but results should skew toward desk/lighting products.

search_queries.name: Full product enrichment
search_queries.notes: Each result should include a fullProduct object with weight, dimensions, and attributes.

product_lookup_queries.name: Valid product lookup
product_lookup_queries.notes: Replace 12345 with a real WooCommerce product ID from your store. Should return full product data.

product_lookup_queries.name: Invalid product ID format
product_lookup_queries.expected: 404 Not found (route doesn't match non-numeric IDs)
